subject: WM-0026 format-only follow-up verified
body: Verified format-only follow-up at 91b3ca2: diff from prior verified coordination commit 011e923 touches only the six declared Prettier-formatted files, with no behavior, owner-store, reservation, derived-index or sim-core boundary changes found. pnpm quality and git diff --check pass; WM-0026 prior verified verdict remains valid.
